LayoutObject.name: Container filename
Media Input
Text Input
String Number Value

Calculation.Text: FAT Modifier @ Chapter::Type = "Media" Or FAT Modifier @ Chapter::Type = "Text" Or FAT Modifier @ Chapter::Type = "Color" Or FAT Modifier @ Chapter::Type = "Link" Or FAT Modifier @ Chapter::Type = "Text"

LayoutObject.name: Color Value

StyledText.Data: Input type: <<FAT Modifier @ Chapter::Type>> <<FAT Modifier @ Chapter::Description>>

Calculation.Text: FAT Modifier @ Chapter::Type ≠ "Media" Or Not SubtitleMedia ( Media MV CH::Container file extension )

Link
